title: AI for Africa Bootcamp 2026
description: A polished static site for the AI for Africa Bootcamp 2026, a residential program in Johannesburg run by African Leadership Academy and MBZUAI.

hero.title: A focused, human-centered introduction to AI for the next generation of African leaders.
hero.summary: This site keeps the program story, schedule, announcements, and people in one clear place so mentors and participants can find what they need quickly.

footer: Built as a small static site. Update the content files, run the build, and publish the generated `site/` folder.
